subject: [SO] Correct connection configuration to sdnc
commit_message:
[SO] Correct connection configuration to sdnc

Issue-ID: INT-1511
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 7 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This change is ready for review.

Patch Set 1:

Reasoning for this change is in linked jira. I've briefly tested this change in local onap environment based on oom master and it appears to solve this issue. I will follow with other components changes later on once I'll be able to verify them (probably tomorrow).
